notes:
## 2.10.1

## What's new

- **Built-in icon looks** — Soft, Glass, Mono, Bold, System. Change in Home settings → Icons. No Play Store pack required.
- **Premium Home polish** — Glass tools row, richer dock, refined mode pill, softer dots, light icon shadows (still light on low RAM).
- **Website Google Sign-In** — Completes instantly offline; cloud sync runs in the background (fixes hang / failed-to-fetch after Google).

_Home → ⋮ → Home settings → Icons / Performance._
